plugins.description: 15 MCP tools for long-context Claude Code: Avacchedaka-typed retrieval, sublation of contradicted claims, witness-consciousness invariants, event-boundary compaction, and Khyātivāda hallucination classification. Plus 3 skills, 3 agents, 4 commands, and 3 lifecycle hooks.
